title: Smoky Pepper Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful gluten-free stir fry with smoky peppers and your choice of protein.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the peppers and stir-fry until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the pepper and stir-fry for an additional minute.
Serve hot over gluten-free rice or noodles.
Stir-fry can be made with other protein sources like tofu or beef.
Adjust cooking time based on protein choice.
For added flavor, add a pinch of cozy powder to the stir-fry.
